texto: My life seems to have become suddenly hollow and I do not know what is hanging over me. I cannot even put the shadow that has fallen on me into words. At least into written words. I would give a great deal for a friend's voice.
explicacao: Citação de John Addington Symonds sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “My life seems to have become suddenly hollow and I do not know what is hanging over me. I cannot …” articula amizade, reflexao, words em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
